RaceDatabaseService - Class in com.gcu.business
Service class for handling business logic related to races.

RaceEntity - Class in com.gcu.models
RaceEntity represents a character race in the application.

RaceRepository - Interface in com.gcu.data
RaceRepository is an interface that extends JpaRepository to provide CRUD operations for RaceEntity objects.
